scripts.release:check: npm test -- --watchAll=false && npm run build && npm run test:release
scripts.release:check:all: npm run release:check && xcodebuild -project ../TribeChallengeTrackerIOS/TribeChallenge.xcodeproj -scheme TribeChallenge -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,OS=18.2,name=iPhone 16' build && cd ../TribeChallengeTrackerAndroid && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.hosting:release: npm run app-links:android && npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync && node scripts/patch-native-plugins.js
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && node scripts/patch-native-plugins.js && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
